tiktok.caption: Your bank charges $900 for a mortgage trick you can do yourself for FREE — here's how 🏠💸

youtube_short.title: Banks Charge $900 For This Free Mortgage Trick
title_alternatives: The $900 Mortgage Trick You Can Do Yourself for Free
Stop Paying Banks $900 — Do This Instead
youtube_short.description: Your bank offers a 'biweekly mortgage program' that saves you $34,000 in interest — and then charges you $900 to join it. Here's the thing: you can do the exact same thing yourself, for free, starting today. Just divide your monthly payment by 12 and add that amount as extra principal each month. That sneaks in one extra full payment per year, and over a 30-year mortgage that trims 4-5 years off your loan and saves you thirty-four thousand dollars. No bank enrollment. No fee. No permission required. #mortgage #personalfinance #moneytips #homeowner #savemoney

hook_line: Banks charge $900 for a trick that's completely FREE
